decisions.name: Use a Layered (N-Tier) Architecture Style
decisions.rationale: The system requires multiple components to interact with each other, such as gesture recognition, face recognition, and hand tracking. A layered architecture style will allow for clear separation of concerns and easier maintenance.

decisions.name: Use a Microservices Architecture for Real-Time Collaboration
decisions.rationale: To enable real-time collaboration, the system will require multiple services to communicate with each other. A microservices architecture will allow for loose coupling and scalability.

decisions.name: Use Threading for Concurrent Execution of Tasks within a Single Process
decisions.rationale: The system requires concurrent execution of tasks, such as image processing and gesture recognition. Threading will allow for efficient use of system resources and faster execution times.

decisions.name: Use Multiprocessing for Parallel Execution of Tasks across Multiple Processes
decisions.rationale: To handle multiple users and different types of gestures, the system will require parallel execution of tasks. Multiprocessing will allow for efficient use of system resources and faster execution times.

decisions.name: Use a Database for Storage and Retrieval of User Data
decisions.rationale: The system will require storage and retrieval of user data, such as gesture recognition models and user preferences. A database will provide a scalable and efficient solution for storing and retrieving data.

decisions.name: Use a Message Queue for Communication between Services
decisions.rationale: To enable real-time collaboration, the system will require communication between services. A message queue will provide a scalable and efficient solution for communication between services.

decisions.name: Use a Cloud-Based Infrastructure for Scalability and Reliability
decisions.rationale: To handle multiple users and different types of gestures, the system will require a scalable and reliable infrastructure. A cloud-based infrastructure will provide the necessary resources and scalability to support the system.

components.name: Gesture Analysis
components.responsibility: Analyze gestures and reflect the corresponding action on the projected surface.

components.name: Customizable Gestures
components.responsibility: Customize the actions for specific gestures.

components.name: Real-Time Collaboration
components.responsibility: Enable real-time collaboration by supporting interactions on the projected surface.

components.name: Face Detection
components.responsibility: Detect the user's face using the YOLOv5 model.

components.name: Contour Detection
components.responsibility: Use contours detection to detect the borders of objects.

components.name: Gaussian Blur
components.responsibility: Use Gaussian blur to mute the image noise.

components.name: Background Subtraction
components.responsibility: Use Background Subtraction (BS) to separate the moving parts.

components.name: Histogram Equalization
components.responsibility: Use Histogram Equalization for image contrast optimization.

components.name: Threading
components.responsibility: Use threading for concurrent execution of tasks within a single process.

components.name: Multiprocessing
components.responsibility: Use multiprocessing for parallel execution of tasks across multiple processes.
